strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript expertise demonstrated in multiple roles (Optilyz pricing team, re:cinq product work) with proven scalability in high-traffic systems
Extensive PostgreSQL-compatible experience (MongoDB, MySQL) alongside Kubernetes deployment (GISCollective) and AWS services (Optilyz, re:cinq) aligning with platform requirements
Strong learning agility shown through rapid stack adaptation (Node/Ember to DLang to Swift) and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (10+ years as
with leadership in TDD/pairing practices) may lead to role mismatch or early attrition
Limited direct React/Nest.js experience (mastered Ember.js and Node.js instead) though transferable frontend skills are evident
High on-site presence requirement (Berlin-based) may conflict with current re:cinq role (April 2025–Present)
response.justification: Bogdan’s 10+ years of fullstack TypeScript leadership, demonstrated through high-scale deployments (Optilyz’s Direct Mail automation, re:cinq’s AI-agent infrastructure) and PostgreSQL-compatible database work, directly address the role’s core needs. His Kubernetes/AWS exposure (GISCollective, Optilyz) and clean architecture focus (TDD/pairing at RIDE Capital) outweigh concerns about React/Nest.js specificity given his adaptability. The sole mitigating factor is his current on-site role in Berlin, which may require coordination but not disqualification.
